name: tzukwan-cli
description: Tzukwan - Open-source AI CLI agent for academic research. Supports any OpenAI-compatible LLM provider.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @tzukwan/core && npm run build --workspace @tzukwan/skills && npm run build --workspace @tzukwan/research && npm run build --workspace @tzukwan/cli
scripts.test:integration: npm run build && node scripts/integration/provider-smoke.mjs && node scripts/integration/runtime-smoke.mjs
scripts.clean: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');for (const dir of ['core','skills','research','cli']) { fs.rmSync(path.join('packages',dir,'dist'), { recursive:true, force:true }); }"
scripts.install:global: npm install && npm run build && npm install -g .

author: tzukwan
